subject: Re:
body:
I'd like to speak with you,, please call though office


----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, November 13, 2007 1:15:06 PM
Subject: 

Hi JE,
 
I was just thinking about you and wanted to share.  I've been thinking alot about what my next plan should be.  After much thought I think I am going to go back to school for the spring and summer session and finish my degree at ISY.  A $6k a year state school is a far cry from an east coast school but to finish my degree is the best thing to do to help me out in my future.  It's always good to have.  Anyway, I just wanted to keep you updated.  
 
I hope you are doing well.  Take care of yourself.
 
cd
